creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Hmm... that's very odd, because my Poudriere (3.0.16) doesn't complain about those issues, nor does `make check-plist` or `make stage-qa`.

My `make stage-qa` does warn that I need to add USES=desktop-file-utils and USES=shared-mime-info, though.

Could I see a copy of your build log?
